user.title: Add Smart Technology scent diffuser
user.description: Enter the diffuser Bluetooth address. Keep it powered on and nearby.

data_description.name: The name shown in Home Assistant.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a supported Scent Tech diffuser.

init.title: Bluetooth protocol options
init.description: The proven single-write mode is recommended. Enable the wake packet only if your diffuser does not react.

data_description.send_wake_packet: Adds the captured 55 AA 01 47 B9 5A packet before each ON/OFF packet. This may cause extra beeps.
